phi.reason: φ (ADR-0003 D6) is the both-strand carry-through fraction of the §6 strand-resolver — a Stage-2 quantity. Caduceus-PS is RC-equivariant, so one Stage-1 pass already covers both strands; φ is not derivable from a Stage-1 candidate scan and is measured at the pre-P5 sizing gate, not here (§10.3).
